basic_details.job_title: DHS Kancheepuram Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Audiologist & Speech Therapist, Social Worker and More
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society Kancheepuram (DHS Kancheepuram) Trauma Care Registry S/N Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://kancheepuram.nic.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the DHS Kancheepuram Recruitment 2026 for Trauma Care Registry S/N, Audiologist & Speech Therapist, and Early Intervention cum Special Educator cum Social Worker posts.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc Nursing, Bachelor’s degree in Speech and Language pathology, M.Sc in Disability studies (Early intervention), Post Graduate Diploma in Early Intervention (PGDEI), B.Ed Special Education
qualification.details: Trauma Care Registry S/N: B.Sc Nursing from Govt. recognized institution Audiologist & Speech Therapist: Bachelor’s degree in Speech and Language pathology from any recognized university in India Early Intervention cum Special Educator cum Social Worker: M.Sc in Disability studies (Early intervention) with basic Degree in Physiotherapy (BPT)/Occupational Therapy (BOT)/Speech language Pathologist (ASLP)/MBBS/BAMS/BHMS or Post Graduate Diploma in Early Intervention (PGDEI) with basic degree in Physiotherapy (BPT)/Occupational Therapy (BOT)/Speech language Pathologist (ASLP)/MBBS or B.Ed Special Education / Bachelor in mental retardation

vacancy_details.Post Name: Early Intervention cum Special Educator cum Social Worker

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Early Intervention cum Special Educator cum Social Worker

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Kancheepuram Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://kancheepuram.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHS Kancheepuram Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DHS Kancheepuram Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DHS Kancheepuram Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DHS Kancheepuram Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Trauma Care Registry S/N: B.Sc Nursing from Govt. recognized institution Audiologist & Speech Therapist: Bachelor’s degree in Speech and Language pathology from any recognized university in India Early Intervention cum Special Educator cum Social Worker: M.Sc in Disability studies (Early intervention) with basic Degree in Physiotherapy (BPT)/Occupational Therapy (BOT)/Speech language Pathologist (ASLP)/MBBS/BAMS/BHMS or Post Graduate Diploma in Early Intervention (PGDEI) with basic degree in Physiotherapy (BPT)/Occupational Therapy (BOT)/Speech language Pathologist (ASLP)/MBBS or B.Ed Special Education / Bachelor in mental retardation

rows.post_name: Early Intervention cum Special Educator cum Social Worker

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Kancheepuram Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://kancheepuram.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHS Kancheepuram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DHS Kancheepuram Recruitment 2026 is 22nd July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Trauma Care Registry S/N posts?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Trauma Care Registry S/N post in the District Health Society Kancheepuram recruitment drive. The total number of vacancies across all posts is three.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the DHS Kancheepuram Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What are the eligibility criteria for the Audiologist & Speech Therapist post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Audiologist & Speech Therapist post, candidates must hold a Bachelor’s degree in Speech and Language Pathology from a recognized university in India.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the DHS Kancheepuram Recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the DHS Kancheepuram Recruitment 2026. The application process is free of cost.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Early Intervention cum Special Educator cum Social Worker post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Early Intervention cum Special Educator cum Social Worker post is Rs. 20,000/- per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the DHS Kancheepuram Recruitment 2026 will be based on an interview. Candidates shortlisted after the initial screening will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Health Society Kancheepuram, which is https://kancheepuram.nic.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the qualification required for the Trauma Care Registry S/N post?
faq.answer: The required qualification for the Trauma Care Registry S/N post is a B.Sc Nursing degree from a Government-recognized institution.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for all the recruited posts under DHS Kancheepuram Recruitment 2026 is contractual. This means the employment will be for a fixed period as per the terms of the contract.
